title: GBrain-BM25 Divergence Log Entry
description: One entry per dual-log query during Stage 1.3. Written by gbrain-divergence-logger.sh.

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp (UTC) when the query was executed

gbrain_top5.description: GBrain top-5 result slugs in rank order

bm25_top5.description: BM25 top-5 result slugs in rank order

top3_jaccard.description: Jaccard similarity of top-3 slug sets: |A∩B| / |A∪B|

top5_jaccard.description: Jaccard similarity of top-5 slug sets: |A∩B| / |A∪B|

latency_gbrain_ms.description: GBrain query wall-clock time in milliseconds

latency_bm25_ms.description: BM25 query wall-clock time in milliseconds

gbrain_empty.description: True if GBrain returned 0 results (potential breaking case)
